metadata.book_title: Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra Vol 2 By Maharishi Parashara

content_blocks.text:
श्रुताश्च बहुधा भेदा दशानां च मया मुने !!
फलं च कीदृशं तासां कृपया मेऽनुच्यताम् ? ।।१२।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
श्रुताश्च बहुधा भेदा दशानां च मया मुने !!
फलं च कीदृशं तासां कृपया मेऽनुच्यताम् ? ।।१२।।
verse_data.topic: Question about types and results of Dasas

content_blocks.text:
1: Maitreya said; O Venerable Said ! I am enlightened with
the various types of Dasas. Kindly apprise me with the nature of
their results.

verse_data.translation:
1: Maitreya said; O Venerable Said ! I am enlightened with
the various types of Dasas. Kindly apprise me with the nature of
their results.
verse_data.topic: Maitreya's request for explanation of Dasas

content_blocks.text:
साधारणं विशिष्टञ्च दशानां द्विविधं फलम् ।
ग्रहणां च स्वभावेन स्थानस्थितिवशेन च ।।१२।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
साधारणं विशिष्टञ्च दशानां द्विविधं फलम् ।
ग्रहणां च स्वभावेन स्थानस्थितिवशेन च ।।१२।।
verse_data.topic: Two types of Dasa results: general and specific

content_blocks.text:
2: Sage Parasara said : - O Vipra ! Dasas emanate two
types of results, one of general nature and two, of pronounced
nature which corresponds to the natural characteristics and acquired
position (in the horoscope) of the planets.

verse_data.translation:
2: Sage Parasara said : - O Vipra ! Dasas emanate two
types of results, one of general nature and two, of pronounced
nature which corresponds to the natural characteristics and acquired
position (in the horoscope) of the planets.

content_blocks.text:
ग्रहवीर्यानुसारेंण फलं शंस्यं दशासु च ।
आद्येऽधिकारिणो खेते दशारम्भे फलं वदेत् ।।१३।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
ग्रहवीर्यानुसारेंण फलं शंस्यं दशासु च ।
आद्येऽधिकारिणो खेते दशारम्भे फलं वदेत् ।।१३।।
verse_data.topic: Results based on planetary strength and Dasa commencement

content_blocks.text:
दशामध्ये फलं वाच्यं मध्यदेशाणणे लगे ।
अन्ते फलं तृतीयस्य व्यस्तं खेते च वक्रगे ।।१४।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
दशामध्ये फलं वाच्यं मध्यदेशाणणे लगे ।
अन्ते फलं तृतीयस्य व्यस्तं खेते च वक्रगे ।।१४।।
verse_data.topic: Results during the middle and end of Dasa, considering planetary condition

content_blocks.text:
3-4: The results of the Dasas of the planets be ascertained
on the basis of the strength of the planets. The planet in the first

3-4: The results of the Dasas of the planets be ascertained

verse_data.topic: Ascertaining Dasa results based on planetary strength

raw_text:
अथ दशाफलाध्यायः ।।४९।।
Chapter - 49
RESULTS OF THE DASAS
श्रुताश्च बहुधा भेदा दशानां च मया मुने !!
फलं च कीदृशं तासां कृपया मेऽनुच्यताम् ? ।।१२।।
1: Maitreya said; O Venerable Said ! I am enlightened with
the various types of Dasas. Kindly apprise me with the nature of
their results.
साधारणं विशिष्टञ्च दशानां द्विविधं फलम् ।
ग्रहणां च स्वभावेन स्थानस्थितिवशेन च ।।१२।।
2: Sage Parasara said : - O Vipra ! Dasas emanate two
types of results, one of general nature and two, of pronounced
nature which corresponds to the natural characteristics and acquired
position (in the horoscope) of the planets.
ग्रहवीर्यानुसारेंण फलं शंस्यं दशासु च ।
आद्येऽधिकारिणो खेते दशारम्भे फलं वदेत् ।।१३।।
दशामध्ये फलं वाच्यं मध्यदेशाणणे लगे ।
अन्ते फलं तृतीयस्य व्यस्तं खेते च वक्रगे ।।१४।।
3-4: The results of the Dasas of the planets be ascertained
on the basis of the strength of the planets. The planet in the first
